title: Python Functions and Scope
description: Practice a function with a local variable and return value.

completionChecks.explanation: total is assigned inside add_tax, so it is local to that function call.
The function adds 20 percent tax, so 100 + 20 is 120.

targetCode:
# Learn: Keep temporary values local to a function.
def add_tax(price):
    total = price * 1.20  # total is local to this call.
    return total

print(add_tax(100))
